crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Polymarket Files Applications to Offer Regulated Margin Trading in US
items.summary: Prediction market platform Polymarket has submitted applications to launch regulated margin trading services in the United States, marking a significant step toward mainstream compliance.

items.title: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal Steps Down
items.summary: Paul Grewal, Coinbase's Chief Legal Officer, has officially stepped down from his executive role but will remain with the company in an advisory capacity.

items.title: Sam Altman's Worldcoin Cuts WLD Unlocks by 43%
items.summary: Worldcoin reduced its daily token unlocks by 43% as of late July, though 4.9 billion tokens remain unlocked and must still demonstrate market demand.

items.title: White House Defends Trump's Crypto Regulatory Appointments Amid CFTC Vacancies
items.summary: The White House is defending President Trump's regulatory appointments for crypto as vacancies at the CFTC complicate the push for new crypto legislation.

items.title: Hyperliquid and Phantom Urge CFTC to Stop Treating Onchain Protocols Like Traditional Brokers
items.summary: Hyperliquid Policy Center and Phantom wallet have petitioned the CFTC to distinguish onchain protocols from traditional brokers and exchanges in regulatory frameworks.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: OpenAI Retires ChatGPT Atlas Browser Less Than a Year After Launch
items.summary: OpenAI is sunsetting the ChatGPT Atlas browser after introducing a more powerful ChatGPT desktop app that includes its own browsing capabilities, ending the browser's short run.

items.title: New York State Courts Ban Smart Glasses to Prevent Secret Recordings
items.summary: New York has banned smart glasses in all 1,240 state, county, city, town, and village courts, covering eyewear capable of capturing audio or video, including those with prescription lenses.

items.title: Waymo Expands Fully Autonomous Rides to Four New US Cities
items.summary: Waymo will begin operating fully autonomous rides without human supervisors in San Diego, Las Vegas, Tampa, and Denver, while also starting testing of the new Hyundai Ioniq 5 EV.

items.title: Official Renders of Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8, Z Fold 8, Watch 9, and Watch 2 Ultra Leak
items.summary: Official renders of multiple new Samsung devices have leaked weeks ahead of the company's next Unpacked event, showcasing the upcoming Galaxy Z Flip 8, Z Fold 8, Watch 9, and Watch 2 Ultra.

items.title: Valve Now Allows SteamOS Installation on AMD-Powered PCs
items.summary: Valve has updated SteamOS to support installation on AMD-powered PCs, with Intel and Nvidia support scheduled to arrive soon, expanding the operating system's hardware compatibility.

items.title: Starlink Private Jet Access Costs Rise to $20,000 Per Month
items.summary: Private jet owners now face monthly Starlink usage fees up to $20,000, with antenna installation costs reaching $200,000, marking a significant price increase for aviation connectivity.

items.title: Tenda Router Firmware Contains Undocumented Authentication Backdoor
items.summary: A vulnerability report warns that five versions of Tenda firmware contain an undocumented authentication backdoor allowing hackers to gain full admin access to affected routers.

items.title: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma Tapped to Advise Federal Reserve on Jobs After Layoffs
items.summary: Days after announcing mass layoffs at Xbox, CEO Asha Sharma was selected to advise the Federal Reserve on jobs, drawing attention to the timing of her new role.

items.title: NHTSA Demands Solution for Autonomous Cars Interfering with First Responders
items.summary: The NHTSA identified a pattern of driverless autonomous vehicles interfering with first responders and is now demanding AV manufacturers provide a solution to the safety issue.

items.title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5bn in Mega US Share Sale
items.summary: Chip giant SK Hynix completed a massive $26.5 billion share sale in the US market, marking one of the largest tech IPOs in recent history.
